parameters.query:
SELECT o.id, o.opp_title, o.agency, o.dept, o.naics_code, o.set_aside, o.estimated_value, o.response_deadline, o.gda_score, o.gda_label, o.ai_analysis, o.assigned_ou
FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o
LEFT JOIN gda_capture_plans cp ON cp.opp_id = o.id
WHERE o.gda_label = 'PURSUE' AND o.gda_score >= 75
  AND o.stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go')
  AND cp.opp_id IS NULL
  AND o.opp_title IS NOT NULL AND o.opp_title != ''
ORDER BY o.gda_score DESC
LIMIT 3

INSERT INTO gda_capture_plans (opp_id, opp_title, contract_value, plan_data, auto_generated, sync_source, created_at, updated_at)
SELECT
  {{ $json.opp_id }}::int,
  '{{ ($json.opportunity_name || $json.opp_title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.allocated_revenue || 0 }}M',
  ('{
    "pwin": ' || {{ $json.pwin || 10 }} || ',
    "capture_stage": "{{ ($json.capture_stage || "Interest").replace(/"/g, "") }}",
    "allocated_revenue_m": ' || {{ $json.allocated_revenue || 0 }} || ',
    "win_strategy": "{{ ($json.win_strategy || "").replace(/"/g, "").replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/\n/g, " ") }}",
    "key_risks": {{ $json.key_risks || "[]" }},
    "next_actions": {{ $json.next_actions || "[]" }},
    "teaming_strategy": "{{ ($json.teaming_strategy || "").replace(/"/g, "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}",
    "incumbent": "{{ ($json.incumbent || "Unknown").replace(/"/g, "") }}",
    "discriminators": {{ $json.discriminators || "[]" }},
    "generated_by": "auto-capture-plan-cron",
    "generated_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
  }')::jsonb,
  true,
  'auto-capture-plan-cron',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gda_capture_plans WHERE opp_id = {{ $json.opp_id }}::int)
RETURNING id, opp_id, opp_title
